message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "NPartition_bijection_length_le_N"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset

noncomputable def NPartition_bijection_length_le_N (N : ℕ) : {μ : Nat.Partition (∑ i : Fin N, 0) // μ.parts.card ≤ N} ≃ NPartition N where
  toFun := λ ⟨μ, h⟩ =>
    let parts' : Fin N → ℕ := λ i => if hi : (i : ℕ) < μ.parts.card then (μ.parts.toList.get ⟨i, hi⟩) else 0
    { parts := parts'
      antitone := by
        intro i j hij
        dsimp [parts']
        split_ifs with hi hj
        · have hcard : μ.parts.card ≤ N := h
          have hpos : (i : ℕ) < μ.parts.card := hi
          have hpos' : (j : ℕ) < μ.parts.card := hj
          have hval : μ.parts.toList.get ⟨i, hi⟩ ≥ μ.parts.toList.get ⟨j, hj⟩ := by
            sorry
          exact hval
        · exact Nat.zero_le _
        · exact Nat.zero_le _
        · rfl }
  invFun := λ ν =>
    let partsMultiset : Multiset ℕ := (Finset.image (λ i : Fin N => ν.parts i) Finset.univ).val
    let partsSum := ∑ i : Fin N, ν.parts i
    have hsum : partsMultiset.sum = partsSum := by
      simp [partsMultiset, Finset.sum_image, Finset.sum_eq_multiset_sum]
    { val := { parts := partsMultiset.filter (· ≠ 0)
               parts_pos := by
                 intro i hi
                 have hi' : i ∈ partsMultiset.filter (· ≠ 0) := hi
                 rcases Multiset.mem_filter.mp hi' with ⟨hi_mem, hi_ne_zero⟩
                 exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi_ne_zero
               parts_sum := by
                 calc
                   (partsMultiset.filter (· ≠ 0)).sum = partsMultiset.sum := by
                     apply Multiset.sum_filter_ne_zero
                   _ = partsSum := hsum }
      property := by
        have hcard : (partsMultiset.filter (· ≠ 0)).card ≤ N := by
          calc
            (partsMultiset.filter (· ≠ 0)).card ≤ partsMultiset.card := Multiset.card_filter_le _ _
            _ = (Finset.image (λ i : Fin N => ν.parts i) Finset.univ).card := rfl
            _ ≤ Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) := Finset.card_image_le
            _ = N := by simp
        exact hcard }
  left_inv := by
    intro ⟨μ, h⟩
    ext
    simp
  right_inv := by
    intro ν
    ext i
    simp
",
      "notes": [
        "The proof is incomplete; the antitone condition in toFun is not fully justified. The bijection construction is sketched but the antitone proof is missing. The invFun uses a filter to remove zeros, but the sum condition for Nat.Partition may not match the size of the NPartition. The left_inv and right_inv proofs are trivial placeholders. This is not a complete formalization."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-005",
      "used_context": [
        "Nat.Partition structure with parts, parts_pos, parts_sum, ext",
        "NPartition structure with parts, antitone, ext",
        "NPartition.toPartition (not used directly but referenced in context)",
        "Finset, Multiset operations"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
